customer_messages.body: Dear Northwind Strategic team, we have identified concerns with your account related to regulatory hold, overdue invoice, delayed shipment, escalated support, usage decline. Our teams are actively working to resolve these issues and will be in touch shortly with next steps. We appreciate your patience and remain committed to your success.
